headline: Bloom Energy (BE) Faces Fresh AI Data Center Power Competition From Gas And Nuclear
summary: Bloom Energy (NYSE:BE) faces fresh competition in AI data center power as Chevron and Microsoft roll out natural gas turbine projects. A new U.S. Department of Energy program is financing next generation nuclear reactors that could also target AI data center demand. These developments point to a wider set of options for operators that had been turning to Bloom’s on site fuel cells for power. Bloom Energy enters this phase with strong recent stock performance and increased investor...

headline: 3 Reliable Energy Dividend Stocks to Buy in June
summary: Crude oil has whipsawed investors all year. WTI spiked to $112.25 per barrel in mid-May as the Iran conflict rattled supply lanes, then drifted back to $84.65 by June 15. headline: President Trump Posts On Truth Social "The big Oil Companies are not dropping their price at the pump commensurate with the sharply lower prices they are paying for Oil. Those prices are dropping like a rock! In other words, customers are being “gouged.” I have instructed the DOJ to immediately start looking into this. Gasoline prices better start going down a lot faster than what I’m seeing! President DJT"
